# Automation Season Audit — Shooting Challenge

**Scope:** Season-sensitive automations only (not Team Shot Tracker)  
**Email ownership preserved:** `118 → 072 → 119 → 074 → Make Bulk Email May 18 → Gmail → writeback`

## Hard-code policy

| Pattern | Severity | Notes |
|---------|----------|-------|
| School-year label `YYYY-YYYY` in executable code | FAIL | Comments/docblocks ignored by default |
| Stale Config `rec…` listed in audit options | FAIL | |
| Other `rec…` literals (must include a digit) | WARNING | Review if season-specific |
| Variable names like `recordingZaToMark` | ignored | Digit required in record id |

## Verification procedure (each season)

1. `node tools/challenge-year/cli.js audit-automations --output tmp/automation-audit`
2. Review FAIL findings; allowlist fixtures only via explicit CLI options.
3. Confirm 074 `sendMode` is Live (or blank + WAS Live).
4. Confirm 118/119 still ON and Week End targeting matches new Weeks.
5. Record evidence URL on launch manifest.

## Test-only inputs

| Automation | Input | Live rule |
|------------|-------|-----------|
| 074 | `sendMode` | Must not be fixed `Test` in PROD |
| 118/119 | `includeSchmidt` / dryRun | Keep Schmidt-safe defaults; do not mass-email |
| 072 | empty-week policy | `send_short` verified |

## Historical-record selection risks

- 005 must not pick Weeks from another Config/year for an Activity Date.
- 031/118 must not create WAS against prior-year Enrollment while processing current season.
- XP writers (010/054/059/066/114) must key off Enrollment/Source Key — never steal prior Enrollment XP.
